message: Who...
This voice...
This is...
Oh, right...    is...
"Yuki!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yuki, you have to get up."

name: Tsukasa
message: "If you keep sleeping, we're going to be late."

name: Tsukasa
message: "It's morning! Get up, Yuki!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Get up already."

name: Yuki
message: "Hmmm..."

name: Tsukasa
message: "No, you can't sleep in. You'll be late again."

name: Tsukasa
message: "She's snoring again. I guess I have no choice."

name: Kagami
message: "Move over."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Whaa?"
Thunk!

name: Yuki
message: "Uwhoa?!"

name: Kagami
message: "How about you get up?"

name: Yuki
message: "Agh! Ow! You're going to break my spine! My spine!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yuki, if you don't get up, you're going to get hurt."

name: Yuki
message: "Aaaah! If you think she's going to hurt me, why don't you stop her?!"

name: Kagami
message: "That's no good. If I stop, you'll go back to sleep. You haven't changed one bit."

name: Yuki
message: "I won't! I promise I won't go back to sleep! So please! Don't sit on me!"

name: Kagami
message: "No way! I can't trust you to get up just because you say you will."

name: Yuki
message: "Are you stupid?!"

name: Kagami
message: "What did you say?! Didn't I come all the way here just to wake you up?! You're going to piss me off!"

name: Yuki
message: "Aaah, n-no. Ah, stop. My spine's going to snap, aaaah."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Um, Onee-chan."

name: Kagami
message: "Be quiet, Tsukasa! I won't move until she gets up!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Um, Onee-chan, I don't think she can get up until you get off of her."

name: Kagami
message: "Oh, I see. That's a pretty good theory you have there."

name: Yuki
message: "It's not a theory! It's a fact, no matter how you look at it!"

name: Kagami
message: "Shut up. I-I'm not that heavy..."

name: Yuki
message: "You totally are!"

name: Kagami
message: "I am not!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Ahaha. Come on, get off her, Onee-chan."

name: Yuki
message: "I thought I was going to die."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Ahaha, I'm sorry. It hurt, didn't it?"

name: Kagami
message: "She's fine. She's just exaggerating."

name: Yuki
message: "Heavyweight class."

name: Yuki
message: "You didn't need to hit me!"

name: Kagami
message: "I-It's because you said something rude."

name: Tsukasa
message: "But you'd probably make up some reason to go back to sleep, so we had to do that to get you up."

name: Yuki
message: "Had to, huh? As if! I'd die if I were woken up like that every day!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Ahaha... But you won't die if you just wake up the first time."

name: Yuki
message: "So you're saying that I'll die if I don't get up?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "I guess so."

name: Yuki
message: "Jeez... Instead of the Wakatsuki sisters we should just call you the Stupid Brigade."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Ahaha. We're not much of a brigade with just the two of us."

name: Kagami
message: "Hmph. I hope you fail and can't graduate."

name: Tsukasa
message: "You say that, but you're the one that's the most worried about her."

name: Kagami
message: "Th-That's―"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Oh, just look at the time. Hurry up or we're going to be late."

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, got it. Anyway, I have morning wood, so I'm going to have to ask you two to step outside."

name: Kagami
message: "Wh-What? Y-Yuki, you're a girl."

name: Yuki
message: "Even women have dicks in their hearts."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Then you should be fine, since we can't see that one."

name: Kagami
message: "Besides, if it's in your heart, you should be able to control it better."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Anyway, we'll believe you for now. We'll wait outside, but you'd better be getting changed."

name: Yuki
message: "Ahh... Kagami has no common sense, sitting on me like that."

name: Yuki
message: "She was so much nicer in the past. When did she become such a mean old lady?"

name: Kagami
message: "Who's an old lady?!"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh? You can hear me."

name: Kagami
message: "Of course I can!"

name: Yuki
message: "Which means you have your ear pressed up against the door, Kagami-san?"

name: Kagami
message: "B-But you would just go back to sleep if we let you!"

name: Kagami
message: "Once, when we were in grade school, we believed you when you said you were gonna get up and you kept us waiting until noon."

name: Yuki
message: "I think there's a problem with you in that case, for waiting that long."

name: Kagami
message: "Y-You were the one that said 'trust me,' so I did!"

name: Yuki
message: "But still, I doubt anyone else would wait more than four hours."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Ehehe. Onee-chan fell asleep while she was waiting."

name: Yuki
message: "Then it ended happily for both of us, didn't it?"

name: Kagami
message: "Of course it didn't!"

name: Kagami
message: "I-It's because you act like that that I decided I wasn't going to be nice to you."

name: Yuki
message: "Now then... Shower, shower."

name: Kagami
message: "I told you we don't have time for that!"

name: Yuki
message: "What? It doesn't matter whether we have time or not, there's no use going to school without showering."

name: Kagami
message: "It matters a lot! If we're late, then there's no point to us coming to wake you up."

name: Yuki
message: "That's not true. There's value in participation, even if you don't win."

name: Kagami
message: "So what exactly is the value of participating in this?"

name: Yuki
message: "They say that with a healthy body comes a healthy mind."

name: Kagami
message: "Are you stupid? Waking you up has nothing to do with our health!"

name: Yuki
message: "The important thing is that you believe it does."

name: Kagami
message: "Shut up! We're going."
Kagami pulled my hand forcefully.

name: Yuki
message: "Whoa... At least let me put on some underwear."

name: Kagami
message: "What?! Y-Yuki, you're not wearing any?!"

name: Yuki
message: "Like I said, I was about to get in the shower."
Kagami sighed.

name: Kagami
message: "All right. Go take a shower if you want."

name: Yuki
message: "Kagami, you're so understanding. It's like you've returned to your younger self."

name: Kagami
message: "Tsukasa, let's go. Leave this idiot behind."

name: Yuki
message: "Aww, that's mean!"

name: Kagami
message: "Then hurry up and get in the shower already!"

name: Yuki
message: "Haa, haa... What did I even shower for if I'm just going to get sweaty again?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Haa, haa... Yuki, could you run a little slower? Onee-chan doesn't look well."

name: Kagami
message: "Ha, ha, I-I'm fine..."

name: Yuki
message: "You heard her."

name: Tsukasa
message: "She's just acting tough... Haa, haa."

name: Yuki
message: "I see. She's just acting tough, but she's still keeping up. I wouldn't have expected any less from Kagami. I'm actually trying pretty hard right now."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Haa, haa. W-Were you trying to leave us behind?"

name: Yuki
message: "Hahaha, not at all. I just thought that if Kagami collapsed, we could stop at a nice cafe or something to nurse her back to health."

name: Kagami
message: "If we stop now, all this running will have been for nothing!"

name: Yuki
message: "That's fine, isn't it?"

name: Kagami
message: "No, it isn't!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Haa... Do you dislike school that much?"

name: Yuki
message: "I hate it! I guess."

name: Kagami
message: "Your grades used to be so good, too."

name: Yuki
message: "Now I'm flourishing in the lower half of the class."

name: Kagami
message: "How can you be flourishing all the way down there?"

name: Yuki
message: "Well, at least I feel like I'm flourishing."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Ahaha,
but you know, it kind of bothers me, too."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh? What's this all of a sudden?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "It's like you quit while you were ahead, you know?"

name: Yuki
message: "Quit while who was ahead? Huh?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "You were so smart when you were a kid. You always made us look bad in comparison. And now, you don't even try. That's why it seems like you quit while you were ahead."

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, but now I'm the stupid one, so we're even."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Not really. Our grades aren't nearly as good as yours were, and you'll probably start studying again when entrance exams come around."

name: Kagami
message: "Haa, haa, you're right. She managed to get into the same school as us, after all."

name: Yuki
message: "That was just a coincidence. I can hardly even keep up in class now. I'll probably fail the entrance exams."

name: Kagami
message: "Haa, haa. I remember telling you that entrance exams aren't that easy, but they were no trouble for you."

name: Yuki
message: "That was a coincidence. The rest of the world isn't that easy."

name: Kagami
message: "I hate how you say that, haa, haa."

name: Kagami
message: "So this summer I'm going to study like crazy, so that you can't catch up."

name: Kagami
message: "I'll make you the dumb one this time. You won't catch up."

name: Yuki
message: "You overestimate me, Kagami."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Now that you mention it, shouldn't you be happy if Yuki skips school?"

name: Yuki
message: "Not like it really matters. I'll just cut all the classes I don't like anyway."

name: Tsukasa
message: "There's such a thing as too much free spirit."

name: Yuki
message: "Freedom is amazing!"

name: Kagami
message: "Wh-Who cares? Can we stop talking until we're done running?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh? Are you tired?"

name: Kagami
message: "N-Not at all!"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Haa, haa, we're here... We were almost late."

name: Kagami
message: "Haa, haa, haa... Dangerous. That was dangerous."

name: Yuki
message: "Haa, haa..."

name: Kagami
message: "Yuki, you're slow."

name: Yuki
message: "Haa... Haa... Why am I carrying your bags?"

name: Kagami
message: "Because you lost at rock-paper-scissors."

name: Tsukasa
message: "You were the one that said the loser had to carry all the others' bags."

name: Yuki
message: "I thought I would make a new rule since Kagami was complaining. I figured it would give the loser a chance to get back in the race."

name: Kagami
message: "Who are you calling a loser?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "But what if Onee-chan had lost?"

name: Yuki
message: "Well, then she would've been late and we would've been just fine."

name: Tsukasa
message: "But even if we weren't late, wouldn't we be in trouble too if we didn't have our bags?"

name: Yuki
message: "Then we could all be late."

name: Kagami
message: "Then what was the point?!"
Ding, dong, ding, dong.

name: Kagami
message: "Huh?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "What's wrong, Onee-chan?"

name: Kagami
message: "Oh, nothing."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Hmm?"

name: Yuki
message: "Mm?"
Kagami was talking so animatedly before, but the second she reached the school gate, she stopped short.
For some reason, she was glaring at the school building.
I wondered what was up.
Even if it was nothing, her face scared me. She looked really scary, the way she was glaring at the building.

name: Yuki
message: "What's wrong, Kagami? Why are you staring at the school?"

name: Kagami
message: "Huh? Why would I be doing that?"

name: Yuki
message: "You were. For a moment, your eyes looked really incredible. It looked like you were ready to pick a fight."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Sh-She probably wasn't doing anything that weird. Probably."

name: Yuki
message: "Well then, is something bothering you?"

name: Kagami
message: "Oh, it's, uh, it's nothing."

name: Yuki
message: "Hmm?"
And then, suddenly Tsukasa started looking at the building in the same way.
The two of them glared at the building.
I might be stating the obvious here, but this was unusual for them.
Why were they staring at the school we'd been going to for years?
I didn't understand.

name: Yuki
message: "What is it? The twins are acting really creepy. What's wrong, Tsukasa?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Oh, it's nothing.

name: Yuki
message: "That's not what your face is saying."

name: Kagami
message: "Tsukasa."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yeah, Onee-chan. What's this? It feels really strange."

name: Kagami
message: "Yeah..."

name: Yuki
message: "Strange?"
I looked up at the school building again.
The building seemed like it was ten or twenty years old.
The design wasn't really out of the ordinary.
And nothing had changed from yesterday.
I would've understood their reaction if it had been transformed into a futuristic Building C that only looked like our school building but could actually transform into a robot.
But I really didn't see anything wrong.

name: Yuki
message: "It doesn't feel like anything's changed."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yeah, you're right, but..."

name: Kagami
message: "Oh. Let's go. The bell's about to ring."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Oh, you're right."
The same scenery. Nothing had changed at all.
But something about the rays of the summer sun and the deep blue sky felt a little off.
That was all.

name: Tsukasa
message: "I wonder what happened. The school seems really noisy."

name: Kagami
message: "Yeah. Maybe something happened."

name: Yuki
message: "Jeez, what are you waiting for? You're going to be late."

name: Kagami
message: "Oh, sorry."

name: Tsukasa
message: "W-Wait a sec."
Chatter, chatter...
Chatter, chatter, chatter...
Chatter, chatter... Chatter, chatter.
Chatter, chatter... Chatter, chatter.
Chatter, chatter, chatter, chatter, chatter.
Chatter.
I opened the classroom door.
The same classroom as always.
The same faces as always.
But still, something was different.
The classroom was loud and chaotic.

name: Female Student
message: "Seems like it really was the girl from class 3."

name: Female Student
message: "I heard she was with some people from another school."

name: Female Student
message: "Really? It actually happened?"

name: Female Student
message: "That's super scary."

name: Male Student
message: "Who's that?"

name: Male Student
message: "You don't know? She really stood out."

name: Male Student
message: "She had really long, black hair."

name: Male Student
message: "Black?"

name: Male Student
message: "She seemed like a total bimbo."

name: Male Student
message: "She was in the classes we had along with class 3. She had a long bob cut."

name: Male Student
message: "The one with huge boobs who acted like she was in The Grudge, or some horror movie like that."

name: Male Student
message: "Yeah, yeah, the crazy Grudge girl. She had huge boobs."

name: Male Student
message: "She was always alone."

name: Male Student
message: "Ah, yeah, I remember her."

name: Female Student
message: "But still, this is right after Shiroyama-kun from class 3. That's kind of scary."

name: Female Student
message: "But wasn't that an accident?"

name: Female Student
message: "Still, it happened just a little while ago. That's scary. So many bad things happening in such a short time is kind of..."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Um, Onee-chan..."

name: Kagami
message: "Yeah..."

name: Miu
message: "Ah, g-good morning. So, uh..."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, you're..."

name: Miu
message: "Haa... Why can't you remember my name? I'm Iwata Miu."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, that's right."
Or at least it sounded right.

name: Miu
message: "Oh, you brought the cute pair along today."

name: Yuki
message: "The cute pair?"
She gazed at Kagami and Tsukasa.
Why did she call them that? I thought Miu was friends with Kagami and Tsukasa.

name: Yuki
message: "But anyway, what happened?"

name: Miu
message: "W-Well, uh... It's kind of..."

name: Yuki
message: "Kind of what?"

name: Female Student
message: "Hey, there was this Takashima girl in the next class, right?"

name: Kagami
message: "Takashima-san?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Wasn't that the Takashima-san that Yuki said she was talking to yesterday?"

name: Yuki
message: "What about her?"
Takashima from the next class over.
And the girls I met yesterday in Suginomiya.

name: Female Student
message: "Takashima committed suicide."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "N-No way."

name: Kagami
message: "Suicide?"
Takashima-san committed suicide?

name: Yuki
message: "Um, by Takashima-san, you mean Takashima Zakuro-san from the class next door, right?"

name: Female Student
message: "Yeah, yeah, the gloomy girl with black hair and a bob cut."

name: Female Student
message: "Yesterday evening, she jumped off a roof near the train station."

name: Female Student
message: "She jumped off a twelve-story apartment complex. Apparently, it was really nasty."

name: Female Student
message: "She jumped with two students from another school."
Yesterday evening, just a few hours after I saw her.
And the two students from another school were probably...
Those two girls that were there with her.
Which means...
They met up there so that they could go kill themselves.
A cold sweat ran down my back.
The palm of my hand hurt.
My hand had apparently balled itself up into a fist from the tension.
When I opened my hand, it was damp with sweat.
I see.
I was... terrified.
I was a lot more upset than I would've expected.
First, I needed to calm down and think.
There are plenty of ways to calm yourself down.
One of those ways is to look at your situation from the perspective of an outsider.
It's the way I prefer.
First off...
I didn't really know her all that well.
She was just a girl I met.
A girl who was prepared to commit suicide that same day.
That's the part that made me feel uneasy.
Any normal girl would've felt uneasy about that.
But does it explain why I was so upset?
Of course not.
That's just the first part of it.
There's something much more important.
The kiss.
I was kissed...
by a girl who was about to jump off a roof and kill herself.
By a girl who I thought I didn't know very well.
That's the reason why I was so shaken.
And worse, the incomprehensible things she said after that...
Those mysterious words that came out of her mouth could be taken in many different ways, depending on the interpretation.

name: Zakuro
message: "I'll give you some of my power."

name: Zakuro
message: "Soon, something amazing will happen."

name: Zakuro
message: "The sky is full of anxious words."
Those vague, philosophical, mysterious words.
And after that...

name: Zakuro
message: "A grudge against you? Heheh. I'm not holding any grudge."

name: Zakuro
message: "I don't have a bad impression of you."

name: Zakuro
message: "Not a bad impression at all."
...she talked about her impression of me.
And then, after that, what she did...
Suicide.

name: Yuki
message: "Calm down."

name: Yuki
message: "Don't think too deeply about it."
Right.
It's dangerous to think too much about a suicidal person's actions. You don't want to speculate on something like that.
A lot of her words were definitely puzzling. They were more than enough to scare me.
But they were just the words of an unstable, suicidal girl.
It would've been absurd to take them at face value.
Let's look at the situation calmly.
That was just before she committed suicide, so she wasn't stable.
And she just so happened to see a girl she knew from school.
In other words, me.
She was full of doubt and fear, and in her last moments she just wanted to talk to someone she knew.
"I don't have a bad impression of you." If you thought about her situation carefully, those words of hers were important.
She was being bullied, so you could think of it like this.
Any person that doesn't contribute to her bullying = a good person.
Even if it was just because I'd never bullied her, I was still definitely a good person in her mind.
Just before her death, that unbalanced girl said a lot of strange things to me. Even the fact that she'd kissed me seemed to make sense considering the situation.
Though it definitely is shocking that she talked to me so casually right before she committed suicide.

name: Female Student
message: "Minakami-san, you talked to her a lot since you're such a nice girl, right?"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"
I couldn't remember anything like that.
Well, I suppose there were a lot of people I'd talked to and forgotten about. She might have been one of them.
It seems like most other people usually avoided her because she was "that girl who gets bullied."
So maybe I looked like I was her friend since I had talked to her a few times without thinking about it.
Things like that are always relative.

name: Female Student
message: "I didn't really know her that well."

name: Female Student
message: "But it's still shocking, isn't it?"

name: Female Student
message: "And it's right after what happened to Shiroyama-kun. This is what they call a series of events, isn't it? After all, Takashima-san..."

name: Miu
message: "B-But that's just a rumor, isn't it?"

name: Female Student
message: "A rumor? Not at all. Everyone's talking about it. She's famous, you know? She's all over the message boards."

name: Miu
message: "You shouldn't talk about someone's death so lightly. And what do you mean about the message boards?"

name: Female Student
message: "I was there."

name: Miu
message: "S-So what?!"

name: Yuki
message: "Jeez. What she's trying to say is that you shouldn't be so damn happy about someone's death. Why does that make you happy?"

name: Female Student
message: "I-It's not that we're happy."

name: Female Student
message: "That's mean, Minakami-san. It's not like I'm happy about it."

name: Female Student
message: "But still, a person from the next class over committed suicide. I'm just shocked. Why would you..."

name: Female Student
message: "Why would you say something like that?"

name: Yuki
message: "Shocked, huh?"

name: Miu
message: "W-Wait. Um... th-the teacher should be here soon."

name: Yuki
message: "It looked to me like you were laughing."

name: Female Student
message: "That's... That's... an awful thing to say..."

name: Miu
message: "Ah, d-don't cry, um..."

name: Yuki
message: "Maybe you're crying because you know I'm right?"

name: Kagami
message: "Yuki!"

name: Yuki
message: "Kagami."
I was surprised. Kagami was glaring at me.
I suppose that's what I should have expected from Kagami.

name: Kagami
message: "You can't say something like that. Apologize to her."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yeah. You can't do that, Yuki."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, yeah. Sorry about that."

name: Yuki
message: "I said too much. I'm sorry. My emotions got the better of me."

name: Female Student
message: "Ah, sure..."

name: Female Student
message: "I'm sorry, too. You were friends with Takashima-san, weren't you?"

name: Yuki
message: "Ahaha..."
We really weren't friends!
I laughed and sat down, but I was coming up with retorts on the inside.
The smile is the most important tool in ensuring smooth human relations. I could just end it there and stop talking to her.
I sat down and looked at Tsukasa and Kagami sitting next to me.
It looked like they were both pretty upset.
"Everyone, please sit down!"
The chatter in the classroom instantly evaporated when the teacher appeared.
Of course, that wasn't because of the teacher's authority.
It was just that we assumed she had the answer to the question on everyone's mind.
The reason for the noise.
The truth behind the rumor.
In other words...
Did Takashima Zakuro really die?
Why did she end her life?
And tons of other questions in that vein.
The teacher stood at the podium.
All eyes in the room were glued to that one spot.

name: Yuki
message: "The classroom hasn't been this quiet in years."
If they always paid this much attention in class, their grades would go up a lot, I bet.
Jeez...
It was like the time before a festival.
Everyone's eyes looked so eager.

name: Kiyokawa
message: "Good morning, everyone."
No one made a sound.
Even the greeting was frustrating.
She seemed to understand what everyone wanted and cut straight to the heart of the matter.

name: Kiyokawa
message: "Some of you may already know, but yesterday, a student from the neighboring class, Takashima Zakuro-san, passed away."

name: Kiyokawa
message: "Unfortunately..."
Tears were forming in her eyes.
And for some reason, the classroom erupted in noise.
The teacher didn't mention her cause of death.
But she had still lent some credence to the rumors.
Even if the death was a suicide, the school wouldn't announce it.
After all, it was difficult to determine whether a death like that was suicide, an accident, or murder.
The only people who knew the truth were probably the police, family, and those at the scene of the incident.
So they didn't want to announce it publicly. The school would probably try their best to sell it as an "accident."
If it was announced as a suicide, lots of people would search for the cause.
The reason for the suicide.
In other words, whether or not there was bullying involved.
But in the end, had the school made the right choice in keeping quiet?
At the very least, this school had already experienced one death by falling before this.
The last one looked like a plain accident, but two deaths in a row will still cause rumors to crop up.
There could be people talking about it on the Internet, too.
And then the mass media might show interest too, since they're always lacking real news to show.
The school could make the situation worse by trying to cover up the facts.
The younger generation knew with the way information spread on the Internet, trying to cover something up just leads to more speculation.
Chatter, chatter...
Chatter, chatter, chatter...
Chatter, chatter...
It was really loud. They were probably bottling it up while the teacher was talking.
The chatter from before didn't even compare to the noise that was filling up the classroom.
People turned and talked to the person behind them.
People broke into tears.
People yelled.
It really was as noisy as a festival.
I sat in the middle of that, thinking, "Crying people are an eyesore."
I couldn't help thinking that,
since it was the only thing that came to mind at the moment.

name: Kiyokawa
message: "Everyone, please be quiet."

name: Kiyokawa
message: "Listen to what I'm saying!"
Chatter, chatter...
Chatter, chatter, chatter, chatter...
Chatter, chatter... Chatter, chatter, chatter.
Chatter, chatter... Chatter, chatter.
Chatter, chatter...
The teacher tried her best to calm down the class.
But the students weren't listening to a word of it.
Just a little while ago, I'd seen this same scene unfold.
Even if it was someone no one cared about, if that person dies, this is the result.
It was really amazing.
The sky was blue.
Probably because the weather was so nice.
For some reason, the sky turns blue when the weather is nice.

name: Yuki
message: "I wonder why it does that. Why is the sky blue when the weather is nice?"

name: Yuki
message: "Is its azure the proper color of the sky?"

name: Yuki
message: "Or is it occasioned by its distance and illimitable extent?"

name: Yuki
message: "As if."
My grandfather used to teach ancient martial arts at a dojo, so there was a time I heard quotations like that every day.
I forget what book it was written in, but I thought what it meant was...
Is the blue of the sky its true color?
Or does it just look that way because it's endless?
I thought it meant something like that.
I wonder if this blue sky looked the same to people two thousand years ago. I'm actually kind of surprised I remembered that.
When I was a child, I thought about the color of the sky too.
Why is it blue?
You know, outer space is black.
When you mix the black from outer space and the white from the sun, you get blue!
But if you actually mixed black and white paint together, it wouldn't really end up looking blue.
So it was a mystery.
Not really, though.
It just looks blue because Rayleigh scattering causes mostly blue light to reach the Earth.
I know that much.
But even though I know that, I can't really explain the color of the sky.
I was on the roof until first period ended.
I cut class.
Though I always did that.
The classroom didn't feel comfortable today, so I got out of there.
I'm what you would call insensitive. I couldn't read the mood. I couldn't match the atmosphere in there.
So I disappeared. I suppose I showed a little sensitivity by doing that.
Which one is it? Heh.
This rooftop is my favorite place, and...
Luckily, there is a nice, shady place that stays cool and breezy even in the middle of the summer.

name: Yuki
message: "Well, then... What shall I do?"
There wasn't much to do, though.
I could either listen to music or read a book.
From those two options, I chose to read.
The title of it was...
The Flying Fiend with Twenty Faces.
Twenty faces flying through the air would be amazing.
I laid down and got comfortable.

name: Yuki
message: "Whoaaaa! Jeez, it's you, Otonashi Ayana-san."

name: Ayana
message: "Interesting?"

name: Yuki
message: "Hey. Don't stand over me all of a sudden like that."

name: Ayana
message: "I have been standing here a long time."

name: Yuki
message: "A long time? Really?"
Had she really been standing there?
My grandfather taught me martial arts, so I'd always been proud of my sharp senses.
And yet this girl managed to slip behind me that easily?

name: Yuki
message: "Ayana-san, do you have any experience with martial arts?"

name: Ayana
message: "Is that book interesting?"
She ignored me.

name: Yuki
message: "B-Book?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, this?"

name: Ayana
message: "Is it interesting?"

name: Yuki
message: "I just started it, so I'm not really sure."

name: Ayana
message: "Hmm."
Otonashi Ayana-san stood and looked down at me.
She probably wasn't planning on moving.

name: Yuki
message: "Hey, how long do you plan on standing there?"

name: Ayana
message: "I had not planned on moving."

name: Yuki
message: "I can see your underwear."

name: Ayana
message: "No, you can't."

name: Yuki
message: "Uh, even if I'm not looking right now, I can look anytime I want, since you're standing over me."

name: Ayana
message: "I don't think that is a problem. After all, you are technically what we call a girl, are you not?"

name: Yuki
message: "What do you mean, 'technically' a girl? That's rude. I'm a pure maiden in the prime of my youth."

name: Ayana
message: "What part of you is pure?"

name: Yuki
message: "Who knows?"
Still, wasn't it a problem that this girl was always wandering around the school instead of going to classes?

name: Yuki
message: "You never go to class, huh?"

name: Ayana
message: "That isn't true."

name: Yuki
message: "Yes, it is."

name: Ayana
message: "Then what about you?"

name: Yuki
message: "I'm fine."

name: Ayana
message: "Then so am I."

name: Yuki
message: "I see."
I see Ayana-san around here a lot when I was cutting class.
Of course, it's not like we're actual friends that hang out together or anything.
I'm happy goofing off without dragging anyone along.
And she's another oddball who skips and never hangs out with anyone else.
We're similar, but different.

name: Ayana
message: "You're finished."

name: Yuki
message: "Because it's a kid's book. It didn't even last me an hour."

name: Yuki
message: "That aside, Ayana-san, aren't you tired of standing there bent over, watching me?"

name: Ayana
message: "The blood is rushing to my head."

name: Yuki
message: "Well, yeah, if you bend over that far, the blood will obviously go to your head."

name: Ayana
message: "Yes, but I was interested in the book too."

name: Yuki
message: "Isn't it hard to read upside down?"

name: Ayana
message: "Not really."

name: Yuki
message: "Really? Jeez."
I took out another book.
But still, I hadn't brought very many books.
This kind of difficult book doesn't really suit me.

name: Ayana
message: "Critique of Pure Reason."

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, the title is kind of cool. The word 'critique' is cool, you know?"

name: Ayana
message: "Not really."
It kind of bugged me how she was just standing there and looking at me.
I was reading a kid's book before, so I thought that maybe she would go away if I read a book that was hard even for me.
Something like this Critique of Pure Reason. I didn't even want to read it myself.

name: Ayana
message: "An erotic book. How interesting."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"

name: Ayana
message: "A book of philosophy written by a woman's genitals. That's erotic."

name: Yuki
message: "U-Um, I'm not sure what I just heard the refined lady in front of me say."

name: Ayana
message: "Who knows what I just said? Heheh."
Otonashi-san laughed. It seemed like she was having fun.
Or so I thought. It was hard to tell when her expression didn't really change at all. Her mouth just curved upward slightly.
Well, putting that aside...

name: Yuki
message: "Excuse me, Ayana-san, you shouldn't say that about such a famous philosopher."

name: Ayana
message: "Heheh. But this book has 'Cunt' written on it."

name: Yuki
message: "U-Uh, Ayana-san, are you some dirty old man?"

name: Ayana
message: "Yes, I'm a dirty old man."

name: Yuki
message: "You say that as if it's a good thing."
I see. She's right. "Kant" does kind of sound like "Cunt."
I heard they pronounced it like "can't" in America so that you could tell the difference. And why does this weird girl know about American slang, anyway?

name: Yuki
message: "A question. Would you prefer we pronounced it like 'can't,' in that case?"

name: Ayana
message: "Heheh."

name: Ayana
message: "Can't. That's interesting."

name: Ayana
message: "The virginity rate among males is increasing nowadays. I suppose this author is one of those men who can't. Heheh."

name: Yuki
message: "Excuse me, but Kant lived a long time ago, so that doesn't really apply to him at all. And what do you mean by 'can't', anyway?"

name: Ayana
message: "Can't get it up."

name: Yuki
message: "Th-That's mean!"

name: Ayana
message: "Cunt, a book written by a man who can't. Heheh."

name: Yuki
message: "Excuse you, little lady. You can't say those kinds of things. There's a limit, and besides, as a joke it's not really all that funny."

name: Yuki
message: "Why do you have such a pitiful look on your face? There's nothing to pity here."

name: Ayana
message: "That isn't true. It's pitiful. This is just too pitiful."

name: Yuki
message: "Why?"

name: Ayana
message: "Because you are here, alone on the rooftop, reading the book 'Cunt', a book written by a man who can't. That's just pitiful."

name: Yuki
message: "Ayana-san..."

name: Ayana
message: "Hmm?"

name: Yuki
message: "That was pretty good."

name: Ayana
message: "Was it?"
The two of us bantered lightly for a while.
I started reading the book.
I got confused because it was so hard, but I kind of wanted to read an abstract book like this, one with no connection whatsoever to our day-to-day lives.
Anyway, today was that kind of day.

name: Yuki
message: "Hah... Finally, it's lunchtime."

name: Ayana
message: "You didn't finish that book."

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, you're right, but that's fine."

name: Ayana
message: "Why?"

name: Yuki
message: "Even if I did finish it, there wouldn't be any point since I wouldn't understand all of it. It doesn't really matter if I finish it or not."

name: Ayana
message: "I see what you mean."

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, I just wanted to waste some time here."

name: Ayana
message: "Hmm."

name: Yuki
message: "And you were bugging me, so I tried to read a hard book."

name: Ayana
message: I see what you mean...?
I see.
Is that all you're going to say, Ayana?
This girl.... She's awfully stubborn...

name: Yuki
message: "So then, why have you been skipping class all this time?"

name: Ayana
message: "I wonder why. I'll answer you in 30 seconds."

name: Ayana
message: "I didn't realize I was up here that long."

name: Yuki
message: "There's no way you wouldn't realize that."

name: Ayana
message: "There is always a way."

name: Yuki
message: "Heh. You seem like you don't have any friends, Ayana-san."

name: Ayana
message: "Friends?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, friends."

name: Ayana
message: "I have them."

name: Yuki
message: "Really?"

name: Ayana
message: "I have friends."

name: Yuki
message: "You have friends? I haven't ever seen you talking to any of your friends."
Ayana-san slowly lifted her finger and pointed.
She pointed...
At me.

name: Yuki
message: "Don't point at me. That's rude."

name: Ayana
message: "Heheh, you're embarrassed."

name: Yuki
message: "What makes you think that?"

name: Ayana
message: "That's just what I think."

name: Yuki
message: "Well, let's put that aside. As far as I can remember, we haven't talked nearly enough to be considered friends."

name: Ayana
message: "Maybe you're right."

name: Yuki
message: "I'm pretty sure I am."

name: Ayana
message: "Yes, but that's how it feels."

name: Yuki
message: "How it feels, huh?"

name: Ayana
message: "Yes."

name: Yuki
message: "Well then, I suppose we should go home? Classes have ended."

name: Ayana
message: "Ended..."
Ayana-san looked up at the sky.
For some reason, seeing that made me shiver.
Her gaze made me think she was looking deep into the abyss.
The sky is far, far away.
Is it because it's so far away...
That it feels creepy?
I shivered when I looked at the sky, the sky that had always been there.
Because something like this had always been hanging over our heads.

name: Yuki
message: "Is its azure the proper color of the sky?"

name: Yuki
message: "Or is it occasioned by its distance and illimitable extent?"
That ancient philosopher's maxim came to mind naturally.
I remembered those words once more.

name: Ayana
message: "It will end, and so it shall return."

name: Yuki
message: "What do you mean?"

name: Ayana
message: "Hmm?"

name: Yuki
message: "No, I'm the one asking the question. Don't look at me like you're the one who's confused."

name: Yuki
message: "You're the one that's saying scary stuff like 'It will end.'"

name: Ayana
message: "Really? Was it cool?"

name: Yuki
message: "No, not really. I wasn't complimenting you."

name: Ayana
message: "I see."

name: Yuki
message: "Please don't look so disappointed."

name: Ayana
message: "I'll do my best."

name: Yuki
message: "You're going to try your best not to look disappointed?"

name: Ayana
message: "Yes. I'll do my best."

name: Yuki
message: "Heheh. Ayana-san, you're interesting."
I tried to ruffle her hair a bit.
But she dodged my hand, as if I was a nuisance.
She really is a strange girl.

name: Kagami
message: "Ah, Yuki."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, Kagami."

name: Tsukasa
message: "You skipped class again."

name: Yuki
message: "Yes, you're absolutely right."

name: Tsukasa
message: "You're not going to graduate at this rate."

name: Yuki
message: "I'm fine. It's calculated truancy."

name: Kagami
message: "There's no such thing. Are you stupid?"
Kagami was probably trying to act normal, but I could tell she was still feeling a bit down.
She was probably still anxious about Takashima-san's death.
I wondered if the clubs would be doing anything today.

name: Yuki
message: "Are you two going to your clubs today?"

name: Kagami
message: "What? Why do you care?"

name: Yuki
message: "Hmm? Because I'm interested in you, Kagami."

name: Kagami
message: "W-What? In me? Ah... Yeah, the kendo club is meeting today. And what do you mean by interested?!"

name: Yuki
message: "Maybe I'm interested in the same way a child is interested in an elephant at the zoo."

name: Kagami
message: "Wha...
What did you just say?!"
Kagami is the kind of animal that is utterly incapable of ignoring something.

name: Yuki
message: "Kendo club, meaning both of you are going?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yeah. I'm in the same club."

name: Yuki
message: "I see. So what should I do while you guys are gone?"

name: Kagami
message: "Huh? Don't ask me."

name: Yuki
message: "Tsukasa?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Huh? I-I don't know..."

name: Yuki
message: "Okay. In that case, I'll wait here until I get an answer."

name: Kagami
message: "What?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Really?"

name: Yuki
message: "Like I said, I don't know what to do, so I'll wait for you two to finish up."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Won't you get bored?"

name: Yuki
message: "Don't worry, I'm really good at wasting time."

name: Kagami
message: "That's not something to be proud of."

name: Yuki
message: "Or would you rather I didn't, Kagami?"

name: Kagami
message: "D-Didn't what?"

name: Yuki
message: "Hmm? Wait on you two, of course."

name: Kagami
message: "I-I don't care."

name: Yuki
message: "I think you do care."

name: Tsukasa
message: "That'd make me happy. Then we could all walk home together."

name: Yuki
message: "Tsukasa is a good girl because she's always honest."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Uwah, don't pet my hair. I'm not a kid."

name: Yuki
message: "I could just go home if you don't want me around, Kagami."

name: Kagami
message: "N-No! It's not that I don't want you around. I don't care either way!"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, really?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "But you really won't be bored?"

name: Yuki
message: "Nah. I look like a slacker, but I actually have plenty of things I need to do."

name: Kagami
message: "Like walking around idly?"

name: Yuki
message: "Of course. I'll idle with all my might."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Even if you say it like that, it's not all that impressive."

name: Kagami
message: "Dummy."

name: Yuki
message: "So I'll kill the time somehow."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Okay."

name: Kagami
message: "Oh, and, uh, Yuki."

name: Yuki
message: "Hmm?"

name: Kagami
message: "Thank you."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Ahahaha. She can't just admit it."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Well then, I'll see you in a bit."

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah. How about we meet up at the gym?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Sure! I'll tell Onee-chan, too."
Kagami seemed a bit more cheerful as she ran to the gymnasium.
I'm glad I was able to cheer those two up.

name: Yuki
message: "So is your club doing anything today, Tsukasa?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yes, we are. The Kendo club is meeting today."

name: Yuki
message: "Kendo club, which means both of you are going, right?"

name: Kagami
message: "Of course. I'm the club leader. There's no way I wouldn't go."

name: Yuki
message: "I see. Well, I was thinking..."

name: Kagami
message: "About what?"

name: Yuki
message: "Maybe I should wait for you two to finish up with your club."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Wh-Why?"

name: Yuki
message: "As thanks for today, maybe. Besides, I have to act like a prince for you two."

name: Kagami
message: "But you're a girl."

name: Yuki
message: "Hmm? Does your prince need to be a boy, Kagami?"

name: Kagami
message: "Huh?"

name: Kagami
message: "Th-That's not... what I...
Hey, what do you mean by that?!"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, nothing."

name: Yuki
message: "I'm no good at studying, but you know, I'm still stronger than any of the guys around here."

name: Tsukasa
message: "The two of us are pretty strong, too. If we have a bamboo sword, at least."

name: Yuki
message: "Sure, I know, but it would still be safer if we were together, right?"

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yeah."

name: Yuki
message: "What do you think, Kagami?"

name: Kagami
message: "I-I... I don't mind."

name: Yuki
message: "So that's settled. I'll kill some time around here."

name: Tsukasa
message: "See you in a little bit."

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah. How about we meet up at the gym?"

name: Kagami
message: "Let's go, Tsukasa."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Yeah. Bye, Yuki."
Well then, what should I do?
Honestly, I didn't really have anything to do.
Since I already skipped class. Ahaha.

name: Yuki
message: "What should I do indeed?"

name: Yuki
message: "I don't really have anything else to do, so..."

name: Yuki
message: "I suppose I'll try the roof again."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh? You're still here, Ayana-san."

name: Yuki
message: "Ayana-san."

name: Yuki
message: "What are you doing, Ayana-san?"
Ayana-san was looking at something.
Though there was nothing there.
Just the sky and the clouds.

name: Yuki
message: "Do you see something?"

name: Ayana
message: "The sky."

name: Yuki
message: "Well, yeah. What kind of sky?"

name: Ayana
message: "Minakami-san."

name: Yuki
message: "Hmm? What is it?"

name: Ayana
message: "If you died, what would happen to you?"
That came out of nowhere. Though I suppose after what happened with Takashima-san, it wasn't that strange.

name: Yuki
message: "I don't know. I've never died before."

name: Ayana
message: "You've never died?"

name: Yuki
message: "Why are you looking at me like that?"

name: Ayana
message: "Heheh. It's nothing."

name: Yuki
message: "What do you mean, it's nothing?"

name: Ayana
message: "It's just that I thought it was a bit odd that someone would be able to say they've never died."
What is this girl talking about?
Who could say that they've... died before?
That's obvious. If I'd died, I wouldn't be living right now.
Otonashi Ayana kept smiling and looking at me.
I didn't understand her.

name: Yuki
message: "If I'd died, I wouldn't be alive, would I?"

name: Yuki
message: "Because I'm living right now, I know I haven't died, right?"

name: Ayana
message: "You do not understand even life. How can you understand death?"

name: Yuki
message: "You're saying I can't understand death because I don't have enough experience in life? That's Confucius, right?"

name: Ayana
message: "You're pretty smart, Minakami-san."

name: Yuki
message: "Not at all. My grandfather used to make me read stuff like that. He would make me recite the Analects."

name: Yuki
message: "But what's that got to do with anything?"

name: Ayana
message: "The End Sky."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? The and sky?"
And sky? Sky and what?

name: Yuki
message: "What's that?"

name: Ayana
message: "What I was looking at."

name: Yuki
message: "Y-You kind of got off topic all of a sudden, Ayana-san."

name: Ayana
message: "I'm not off topic. I returned to the topic."
I originally asked what she was looking at, so she was technically right.
I looked at the sky where Ayana-san was looking.
Just a plain old sky.
Pure blue. Nothing other than a normal sky.
Nothing more.

name: Ayana
message: "What's wrong, Minakami-san?"

name: Yuki
message: "Nothing. Nothing's wrong."

name: Ayana
message: "You can't see it?"

name: Yuki
message: "See what? It's just the sky."

name: Ayana
message: "You will."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"

name: Ayana
message: "There will be a time when you will be able to see it too."

name: Yuki
message: "I can never understand your jokes."

name: Ayana
message: "I see."
Ayana-san looked up at the sky again.
But still, what the heck is the "And Sky"?
Maybe it's another one of her incomprehensible jokes.
But still...
I wonder what she was trying to say. Was it related to Takashima-san's suicide?
What the... I feel... kind of dizzy.

name: Yuki
message: "Though I really don't have anywhere to go..."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh well."
I didn't really know where to go, so...
I just walked around aimlessly.
And then...

name: Yuki
message: "Classroom 3."
It was Takashima Zakuro's classroom.
No one was in the classroom, but there was a vase of flowers on one of the desks.
I'd seen that on TV and in manga, but I guess people really do put flowers on the desk like that.
I went over to the desk with the flowers.

name: Yuki
message: "I see. So that means this was Takashima Zakuro-san's seat."
"I'll give you some of my power."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"
Wh-What?
I felt kind of... dizzy.
"What are you doing here?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh?"

name: Yuki
message: "Wh-Who are you?"
"What do you mean, who am I? You're Minakami-san from the next class over, right?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yes, I am. And?"
"What were you doing in front of Takashima-san's desk?"

name: Yuki
message: "I just came to look."
"To look. Do you..."

name: Yuki
message: "Actually, I saw Takashima-san just before she committed suicide."
"Huh? You did?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yes. I bumped into her in Suginomiya, yesterday evening."
"Y-You two were friends?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, no, not really. She started talking to me. It kind of bothered me, so I came here."
"Huh? You talked to her?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yes."
"Wh-What did she say?"

name: Yuki
message: "Why are you so concerned about what happened to her?"
"Huh? Wh-What do you mean?"

name: Yuki
message: "Are you her sister?"
"Are you saying you don't remember me?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yes. Who are you?"
"Are you stupid? I'm Senagawa Yui,

name: Senagawa
message: the homeroom teacher here. I even teach your math class."

name: Yuki
message: "Which means..."

name: Senagawa
message: "Which means I'm one of your teachers. Jeez."

name: Yuki
message: "You just looked familiar, so I thought you might've been Takashima-san's sister or something."

name: Senagawa
message: "I don't think the two of us look alike at all, though."

name: Yuki
message: "Really?"

name: Senagawa
message: "Haa... Anyway, what did you two talk about?"

name: Yuki
message: "Uh, well... How should I put it..."
Tribadism and the end of the world.
As if I could say that.

name: Yuki
message: "It was kind of a strange conversation."

name: Senagawa
message: "A strange conversation?"

name: Yuki
message: "She said that the sky was full of anxious words. And, like, 'I'm going to protect the world, yay,' or something."
Though she didn't say, "yay".

name: Yuki
message: "Is something wrong?"

name: Senagawa
message: "Oh, th-that's what it was. I see."

name: Yuki
message: "Did that help you out?"

name: Senagawa
message: "Ah, yeah. Takashima-san's emotions were unstable at the time she died. That might be our collateral."

name: Yuki
message: "Her emotions were unstable?"

name: Senagawa
message: "A-Anyway, why are you here? There aren't any club activites going on in here."

name: Yuki
message: "Um, I just explained why."

name: Senagawa
message: "A-Anyway, would you please leave the classroom?"

name: Yuki
message: "S-Sure..."
Like that, I was chased out of the classroom.
Mrs. Senagawa Yui, huh? So she was the math teacher.
The homeroom teacher next door.

name: Yuki
message: "She's probably not having much fun right now."
Having one of your students commit suicide would be a big problem for a teacher.
And if the rumors about the bullying got out, the mass media might get involved too.

name: Yuki
message: "She was really on edge. Poor thing."
I stumbled down the steps.
I... might be a little bit sick.
I feel kind of dizzy...

name: Yuki
message: "Ooh... Wha... Vertigo?"
I staggered outside and ended up behind the school.

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, I wasn't really looking where I was going, and I ended up here at the old pool."

name: Yuki
message: "Actually, when are they going to demolish this thing?"
Last year, our school finished some major renovations.
The gymnasium got renovated, and a huge indoor pool was installed.
So this pool wasn't being used at all. There was no water in it, even though it was the middle of summer.

name: Yuki
message: "A pool without water looks kind of crappy, doesn't it?"

name: Yuki
message: "It's not like they're totally letting it fall apart or anything, but it just feels like an old ruin now that it's not being used."
Though it looked like the drain was still shut, since a bit of water was collecting at the bottom of the pool.

name: Yuki
message: "Shouldn't they do some maintenance even if it's not getting used? Huh?!"

name: Yuki
message: "Ugh... This dizziness won't go away."
What's happening? I suddenly feel sick...
I definitely don't feel good at all...

name: Yuki
message: "Hmm?"
I felt some sort of presence.
I turned to look toward that presence and... somehow, I got the impression that someone had just crawled out of the pool in front of me.
I was struck with vertigo when I turned.
My eyes felt like they were full of needles, and my vision went pure white. For a moment I couldn't tell who was in front of me.
My vision returned to normal. I really wasn't feeling good today.

name: Yuki
message: "Um, what a coincidence meeting you here. You were, uh, Mamiya Takuji-kun, right?"

name: Takuji
message: "Y-You're... Minakami-san."

name: Yuki
message: "Why are you hanging around here?"

name: Yuki
message: "Actually, where did you crawl out of? You weren't here a moment ago."

name: Takuji
message: "Huh? Uh, huh?"
He looked like he was upset to run into me in a place like this.

name: Yuki
message: "Why did it bother you when you saw me?"

name: Takuji
message: "No, uh..."

name: Yuki
message: "And why did you suddenly appear here?"

name: Takuji
message: "No, it was my wallet, you see."

name: Takuji
message: "I dropped my wallet around here."

name: Yuki
message: "Your wallet?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, that's right. I dropped my wallet. Ah, I have to hurry. I'll be going, then."

name: Yuki
message: "I see..."
Mamiya Takuji left, almost running.

name: Yuki
message: "What's up with him?"
It was like he was avoiding me.
Hmm.
Mamiya Takuji.
Didn't I run into him the other day...
I couldn't remember any time we'd interacted in particular.
He was in the same class as me, but I hardly ever saw him.
Well, I guess I did cut class a lot, and he was usually skipping school altogether.
He was kind of like Takashima-san, being separated from the rest of the class.
He might have been getting bullied, but I wouldn't know anything about that.
I wondered what he thought about Takashima-san's suicide.

name: Yuki
message: "Well then, I should get going too."

name: Yuki
message: "Where should I go? Maybe the staff room?"
No way.

name: Yuki
message: "I cut class. I'd probably get in trouble if I went there. Not like I really have any business there, anyway."

name: Yuki
message: "I wonder what they would say if they saw me. They probably wouldn't say anything, though."
That was the nice part of being a flunky. They'd already given up on me.

name: Yuki
message: "Where should I go? Maybe the gymnasium?"
There were lots of things going on in the newly renovated gym, like the kendo and archery club meetings.
So of course Kagami's club activities were in the gym.

name: Yuki
message: "Maybe I could kill some time in the gym. There's plenty to do there."

name: Yuki
message: "Worth a look."
While heading to the gymnasium, I spotted a girl with two antennae sprouting from her head.

name: Yuki
message: "Hola, Kagami. Como estas? Yo soy una extraterrestre."

name: Kagami
message: "What is it?"
She turned slowly and scowled at me. I guess she was about to go change, since she had her gym clothes and bamboo sword under her arm.

name: Yuki
message: "Could you act just a little bit happier to see me?"

name: Kagami
message: "I don't think anyone would be happy after hearing that kind of greeting."

name: Yuki
message: "I said I was an alien."

name: Kagami
message: "Haa... So what do you want?"

name: Yuki
message: "That's cold. I'm trying my best!"

name: Kagami
message: "Well, it seems you really did wait for us, but you look bored, and it doesn't really look like you're trying your best, either."

name: Yuki
message: "That's not true! I've been doing my best. First, I would stand around, then sit for a while, then get up again. Then I walked around for a while, and..."

name: Kagami
message: "Are you some old man?"

name: Yuki
message: "No, I'm as young and spry as ever."

name: Kagami
message: "You sure don't act like it."

name: Kagami
message: "Well, sorry for making you wait for me."

name: Yuki
message: "No, I was the one that wanted to do it. It's fine."

name: Yuki
message: "Why is your face getting red?"

name: Kagami
message: "Who cares about something trivial like that?!"

name: Yuki
message: "Whoa! Don't swing your sword at me!"

name: Female Student
message: "Hey!"

name: Yuki
message: "Come on. They're calling for you."

name: Kagami
message: "Tch."

name: Yuki
message: "Don't click your tongue at me."

name: Kagami
message: "I missed out."

name: Yuki
message: "V-Violence isn't the answer..."

name: Yuki
message: "It's getting late. They should be finishing up soon."
I tried my best to kill some time, but I ended up just walking around outside since I didn't feel comfortable inside the school building.
Then I ended up on the roof, where I continued reading that book.
The book was a pain in the ass to read, but that made it better for killing time.

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"
When I was about to go to the gym, I remembered Kagami saying something like, "The club is meeting on the field today, not in the gym, so don't bother going to the gym 'cause we won't be there."
I followed her advice and headed out to the field, but...

name: Tsukasa
message: "Ah, Yuki!"
Tsukasa ran over when she saw me.

name: Tsukasa
message: "Ahahaha. Sorry to keep you waiting."

name: Yuki
message: "No, it wasn't all that not, not, not awful at all."

name: Kagami
message: "Knowing you, you were probably just sleeping anyway."

name: Coach
message: "Gather up! Let's review what we covered today!"
The voice that echoed across the field probably belonged to their coach.
Tsukasa and Kagami hastily ran over there.
While she was leaving, Tsukasa mouthed the word "sorry" at me.
I waved at her, as if to say, "Don't worry about it."
Review, huh? They'd already changed back into their uniforms, so they'd probably finish up soon.
I leaned against the wall and waited for them to finish.

name: Yuki
message: "Whoa."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, it's just you, Ayana-san."

name: Ayana
message: "Yes. I am Ayana-san."

name: Yuki
message: "What are you doing at school this late? I figured someone like you would be long gone by now."

name: Ayana
message: "Someone like me is still here."

name: Yuki
message: "I see."

name: Ayana
message: "Ah."

name: Yuki
message: "Hmm?"

name: Kagami
message: "We're done."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Let's head home."

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"
Ayana-san was gone.

name: Kagami
message: "What's wrong?"

name: Yuki
message: "Uh... nothing."
I was going to introduce Ayana-san to them, but it seems she got spirited away.

name: Yuki
message: "We're here. This is the Wakatsuki house, and this is the Minakami house."

name: Kagami
message: "Um, Yuki."

name: Yuki
message: "Yes?"

name: Kagami
message: "Sorry. I guess we were a nuisance today."

name: Yuki
message: "What do you mean? You weren't a nuisance."

name: Kagami
message: "But thanks to that, Tsukasa and I were able to be with you. So thank you."

name: Kagami
message: "Aaah, don't say anything, don't say anything. Don't destroy the mood."

name: Kagami
message: "Occasionally, even I feel like I need to say thanks to you."

name: Yuki
message: "Heheh. Understood."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Thank you, Yuki."

name: Kagami
message: "Really, thanks for everything today, Yuki."

name: Yuki
message: "Hahaha. If you want to pay me back, you could be a little more ladylike when you come to wake me up tomorrow."

name: Yuki
message: "Boys won't like you if you keep acting like that."

name: Kagami
message: "Who cares about them? B-Besides, you could act a little more ladylike yourself."

name: Yuki
message: "Hahaha. I'm fine. I'm not interested in boys, so I don't need to act girly."

name: Kagami
message: "You aren't?"

name: Yuki
message: "Aren't what?"

name: Kagami
message: "No. It's nothing. Let's go."

name: Tsukasa
message: "Ah, Onee-chan!
Anyway, thanks for today, Yuki."

name: Yuki
message: "Suicide..."

name: Yuki
message: "Takashima Zakuro..."
It didn't have anything to do with that, right?
That...
The accident where Shiroyama Tsubasa fell to his death.

name: Yuki
message: "Ahaha... It's kind of scary thinking about those things, so I'd better stop."
That's right.
What was I supposed to do when something like that happened so close to me?
Takashima-san's suicide and Shiroyama Tsubasa's accident...
They were unrelated.
Two rare events just happened to occur in a short period of time.
Shiroyama Tsubasa's death by falling wasn't related.
After all, if it was...
